subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Promised One mentioned in the books of old [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو الموعود المذکور فی کتب القبل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
